scripts.build: cd nike_vibe_recruitment && npm install && npm run build && cd .. && mkdir -p out/dashboard && cp -r nike_vibe_recruitment/dist/* out/dashboard/ && cp index.html brand_collaboration.html rpg_stats.html style.css rpg_stats.css script.js rpg_script.js hero.png out/ && cp *.json out/ && cp -r images out/
